title: arenaria dawsonensis var. litorea
intro: Arenaria dawsonensis var. litorea, also known as a coastal sandwort or sea sandwort, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to coastal regions in North America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Arenaria dawsonensis var. litorea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are said to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
